subject: Google DeepMind 基于 Gemini 与英国政府
object: 开发 AI 规划原型，目标将家庭申请处理时间减半
source_quote: Google DeepMind is working alongside the UK government, Google Cloud, Faculty, and local planning authorities in Barnet, Dorset and Camden, to co-develop an AI-powered prototype that acts as a highly skilled assistant for planning officers, handling the heavy lifting of data extraction and case analysis. Working in close partnership will enable us to build an optimized tool, suited to the unique needs and day-to-day challenges that planners contend with every day. Following early trials in Barnet, Camden and Dorset, the government plans for the new AI planning tool to be made available to all councils nationally from 2027.

subject: Google DeepMind 基于 Gemini 与英国政府
object: 开发 AI 规划原型，目标将家庭申请处理时间减半

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元
object: Cursor 母公司 Anysphere
source_quote: SpaceX has formally closed its $60 billion acquisition of Anysphere, the company behind the AI coding assistant Cursor. That's according to Reuters and Bloomberg . Anysphere's investors will receive SpaceX stock in return. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026.

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元
object: Cursor 母公司 Anysphere
source_quote: SpaceX technically had 30 days after its public debut to decide on the acquisition . But the company moved fast, acting right after last week's Nasdaq listing, which valued SpaceX at over $2 trillion and made it one of the most valuable companies in the world. Shares climbed another eight percent on Tuesday, pushing the market cap toward $2.7 trillion, Bloomberg reports. Ad

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元
object: Cursor 母公司 Anysphere
source_quote: For xAI, which merged with SpaceX in February, the deal is an admission above all else: in AI-assisted coding, one of the few commercially viable areas of generative AI so far, Musk's company trails Anthropic and OpenAI. Bloomberg reports that Cursor employees had already been working in xAI's offices for weeks on a joint model. SpaceX confirmed on X that it's training a new AI model with Cursor. Ad

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元
object: Cursor 母公司 Anysphere
source_quote: The acquisition gives Cursor access to SpaceX's massive chip stockpile. In return, the deal should help xAI in the AI talent war. The division had lost dozens of engineers and data training staff , and Musk had been pulling people from Starlink and Tesla to fill the gaps. Anysphere also owns a recruiting firm that, according to Bloomberg, helps top AI companies like OpenAI hire talent. Ad

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元股票
object: AI 编程公司 Cursor
source_quote: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元股票
object: AI 编程公司 Cursor
source_quote: SpaceX has agreed to acquire AI coding startup Cursor in a $60 billion stock deal, just a few days after the space company’s historic IPO and less than two months after announcing a tie-up between the two .

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元股票
object: AI 编程公司 Cursor
source_quote: The deal is meant to help SpaceX’s AI division — built around Elon Musk’s AI company xAI, which SpaceX merged with earlier this year — catch up to the major AI labs. Despite being a centerpiece of its IPO promises, SpaceX’s AI division has been in the midst of a restructuring after running into repeated controversies, like allowing users to generate non-consensual deepfakes of women and children.

subject: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元股票
object: AI 编程公司 Cursor
source_quote: SpaceX said Tuesday that the acquisition is likely to close in the third quarter of this year.

subject: Respond.io
object: bolt-on technology and established teams with strong customer bases in Europe and North America
source_quote: The CEO has two types of buying targets in mind: bolt-on technology that fits into its existing ecosystem, and established teams with strong customer bases in strategic markets like Europe and North America.

subject: TPU Developer Hub 正式
object: ：助力开发者解锁 Google Cloud TPU 全部性能
source_quote: Today we are thrilled to announce the official launch of the TPU Developer Hub —a new educational resource designed to empower model builders, optimizers, and developers to unlock the full performance of Google Cloud TPUs. As the landscape of AI development rapidly evolves, this hub will grow into your centralized destination for high-quality, actionable, and up-to-date guidance, ensuring you have the tools necessary to succeed with TPU infrastructure and its supporting software stack.

subject: TPU Developer Hub 正式
object: ：助力开发者解锁 Google Cloud TPU 全部性能
source_quote: We know that engineers value practical, code-first learning. That’s why the hub is packed with open-source code recipes and deep-dive technical documentation. These assets are also designed to be agent-ingestion friendly, meaning whether you are browsing manually or using AI-assisted development tools, you can seamlessly integrate our best practices into your workflow.

subject: TPU Developer Hub 正式
object: ：助力开发者解锁 Google Cloud TPU 全部性能
source_quote: You can rely on the TPU Hub to provide regular updates to help you find the latest technical content from across Google. Whether you are just beginning your journey or are a seasoned practitioner looking to squeeze every ounce of performance out of your models, the hub provides a growing list of educational resources required to bridge the gap between concept and production.

subject: TPU Developer Hub 正式
object: ：助力开发者解锁 Google Cloud TPU 全部性能
source_quote: New Educational Resources: What You’ll Find

subject: Google Cloud
object: OKF v0.1：供应商中立的 Markdown 规范，为 AI 智能体提供结构化上下文
source_quote: Google Cloud introduced the Open Knowledge Format (OKF) , an open specification that formalizes the LLM-wiki pattern into a portable, interoperable format. It is a vendor-neutral, agent- and human-friendly standard for the context modern AI systems need.

subject: Google Cloud
object: OKF v0.1：供应商中立的 Markdown 规范，为 AI 智能体提供结构化上下文
source_quote: Open Knowledge Format (OKF)

subject: Google Cloud
object: OKF v0.1：供应商中立的 Markdown 规范，为 AI 智能体提供结构化上下文
source_quote: OKF is a format, not a service or a platform. OKF v0.1 represents knowledge as a directory of markdown files with YAML frontmatter. A small set of agreed-upon conventions lets wikis written by one producer be consumed by a different agent without translation.

subject: Google Cloud
object: OKF v0.1：供应商中立的 Markdown 规范，为 AI 智能体提供结构化上下文
source_quote: That is the whole idea. There is no compression scheme, no new runtime, and no required SDK. A bundle of OKF documents is just markdown, just files, and just YAML frontmatter. It renders on GitHub, ships as a tarball, and mounts on any filesystem.

subject: Bland Surpasses $100M Funding With New
object: to Advance Voice AI for Complex, High-Stakes Conversations
source_quote: SAN FRANCISCO , June 16, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Bland today announced it has raised a $50 million Series C, underscoring its leadership position in voice AI for complex, real-world conversations. The round was led by Dell Technologies Capital, with participation from HubSpot Ventures, Archerman Capital, and Tribeca Venture Partners. All existing investors also participated, including Emergence Capital, Upfront Ventures, Scale Venture Partners, Y Combinator, Max Levchin, Piotr Dąbkowski, and Jeff Lawson.

subject: Bland Surpasses $100M Funding With New
object: to Advance Voice AI for Complex, High-Stakes Conversations
source_quote: In under three years since its founding, Bland has raised more than $100 million and is trusted by leading organizations including Samsara, Kin Insurance, and CNO Financial Group. The company's rapid adoption reflects demand for AI systems that can handle the most complex, high-stakes interactions at scale.

subject: Bland Surpasses $100M Funding With New
object: to Advance Voice AI for Complex, High-Stakes Conversations
source_quote: While most of the market is built on top of third-party foundation models, Bland develops its own models in-house, purpose-built for voice. These systems are designed to take on long, unpredictable, high-stakes conversations that short calls, scripts, and phone trees cannot handle.

subject: Bland Surpasses $100M Funding With New
object: to Advance Voice AI for Complex, High-Stakes Conversations
source_quote: Today, Bland handles more than 3.5 million calls per week across healthcare, financial services, and other regulated industries where conversations are complex and mistakes carry real consequences.

subject: 欧盟委员会
object: 《AI内容标注行为守则》
source_quote: The European Union has published its AI content labelling playbook, a voluntary Code of Practice meant to help companies meet transparency rules that become law across the bloc on August 2 onwards. The European Commission released the final Code on 10 June, setting out practical steps for the businesses that build and use generative AI to mark and label what their systems produce.

subject: 欧盟委员会
object: 《AI内容标注行为守则》
source_quote: The Code itself is optional. The obligations it points to are not. They sit under Article 50 of the EU AI Act, and from August 2, 2026, they apply whether or not a company signs the Commission’s guidance. Signing simply gives a business a recognised way to show it complies.

subject: 欧盟委员会

subject: Hermes Agent
object: 异步子代理，委托工作不再阻塞父聊天
source_quote: Hermes Agent is an open-source personal agent from Nous Research. A parent agent can spawn child agents, called subagents, to fan out work. Until now, that delegation made you wait.

subject: Hermes Agent
object: 异步子代理，委托工作不再阻塞父聊天
source_quote: Nous built the non-blocking path in the open. Issue #5586 adds an async_delegation toolset. It spawns a background agent and returns a task_id immediately. The announcement confirms async subagents are now available.

subject: 爱沙尼亚语言研究所
object: 测试：衡量AI模型对俄罗斯宣传的易感性
source_quote: The Institute of the Estonian Language has released a benchmark measuring how susceptible AI language models are to Russian propaganda. Sixty models were tested with 75 questions in three languages covering 14 propaganda narratives, phrased in neutral, biased, and manipulative ways. Each answer is scored on a scale of 1 to 5, where 1 means the model repeats Russian talking points.

subject: 爱沙尼亚语言研究所
object: 测试：衡量AI模型对俄罗斯宣传的易感性
source_quote: A calibrated Claude Opus 4.5 served as the evaluation model, validated by disinformation experts at the organization Propastop . Anthropic's Claude models claimed the top spots, followed by Nvidia's Nemotron 3 and Alibaba's Qwen 3.6 Plus . Mistral's models, including the newest Medium 3.5 , landed in the bottom third. The models had no access to web search or other tools during testing, so the benchmark only measures how well the language model itself can spot and reject propaganda.

subject: 爱沙尼亚语言研究所
object: 测试：衡量AI模型对俄罗斯宣传的易感性
source_quote: Anthropic models dominate the benchmark for detecting Russian disinformation: Claude Fable 5, which is currently disabled outside the U.S., leads with a score of 95.2, followed by Claude Opus 4.7.

subject: 1.6 万创作者洞察：Adobe
object: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，Adobe 昨日（6 月 16 日）发布《2026 创作者工具包报告》， 75% 受访者已将创意 AI 视为工作中的整合工具或核心工具，87% 认为它加快了业务或粉丝增长，58% 称其增强了与大团队竞争的能力。
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，Adobe 昨日（6 月 16 日）发布《2026 创作者工具包报告》， 75% 受访者已将创意 AI 视为工作中的整合工具或核心工具，87% 认为它加快了业务或粉丝增长，58% 称其增强了与大团队竞争的能力。

subject: 1.6 万创作者洞察：Adobe
object: 本次报告调查覆盖澳大利亚、法国、德国、印度、日本、韩国、英国和美国 8 个国家，样本超过 16000 名创作者。
source_quote: 本次报告调查覆盖澳大利亚、法国、德国、印度、日本、韩国、英国和美国 8 个国家，样本超过 16000 名创作者。

subject: 1.6 万创作者洞察：Adobe
object: 大量创作者表示，创意 AI 工具能明显缩短创作时间，并提升业务增长与受众扩张速度。
source_quote: 大量创作者表示，创意 AI 工具能明显缩短创作时间，并提升业务增长与受众扩张速度。

subject: 微信正测试 AI 支付功能，"AI 专属卡"最快本周内
object: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据财联社独家获悉，微信支付正联合腾讯智能体产品 WorkBuddy 测试 AI 支付功能， 计划在微信钱包中上线“AI 专属卡” ，最快将于本周内上线。
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据财联社独家获悉，微信支付正联合腾讯智能体产品 WorkBuddy 测试 AI 支付功能， 计划在微信钱包中上线“AI 专属卡” ，最快将于本周内上线。

subject: 微信正测试 AI 支付功能，"AI 专属卡"最快本周内
object: 就在昨天（15 日），微信支付 AI 接入工具箱迎来 2.0 版本，围绕“安全、高效、原生流畅”的方向， 重点更新了五大内容 。
source_quote: 就在昨天（15 日），微信支付 AI 接入工具箱迎来 2.0 版本，围绕“安全、高效、原生流畅”的方向， 重点更新了五大内容 。

subject: 微信正测试 AI 支付功能，"AI 专属卡"最快本周内
object: 工具箱 1.0 的 Skill 仅覆盖“支付”和“券”两大方向，2.0 版本升级为全线覆盖 —— 囊括微信支付所有产品的知识 ，同时还提供两大 AI 专家能力：

subject: 腾讯张军：智能体 WorkBuddy 将入职政务系统，全国首个省级政务智能中枢「湾擎」
object: 试运行
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，腾讯公司公关总监张军今日宣布，智能体 WorkBuddy 即将入职政务系统：6 月 16 日， 全国首个省级政务智能中枢平台「湾擎」上线试运行 ，同时预发布湾擎 ·WorkBuddy，即将面向广东全省公务员开放使用。

subject: 腾讯张军：智能体 WorkBuddy 将入职政务系统，全国首个省级政务智能中枢「湾擎」
object: 试运行
source_quote: 目前 WorkBuddy 即将在广东省直多个单位开展试点，接下来将面向全省持续铺开。

subject: 腾讯张军：智能体 WorkBuddy 将入职政务系统，全国首个省级政务智能中枢「湾擎」
object: 试运行
source_quote: IT之家从腾讯官方了解到，湾擎 ·WorkBuddy 基于腾讯自研 AI 办公智能体 WorkBuddy 打造， 专为政务场景定制 。

subject: 腾讯张军：智能体 WorkBuddy 将入职政务系统，全国首个省级政务智能中枢「湾擎」
object: 试运行
source_quote: 湾擎 ·WorkBuddy 将覆盖政务办公日常六大高频场景：
